title: Canadian AI firm Cohere to merge with German company Aleph Alpha
description: Canadian AI company Cohere has signed a deal with Germany’s Aleph Alpha in a bid to create an independent alternative artificial intelligence company.
content:
TORONTO — Canadian AI company Cohere has signed a deal with Germany’s Aleph Alpha in a bid to create an independent alternative artificial intelligence company.
Financial terms of the agreement were not immediately available.

title: Trump admin vows crackdown on Chinese companies 'exploiting' AI models made in US
description: WASHINGTON, Apr 24: The Trump administration is vowing to crack down on foreign tech companies’ exploitation of US artificial intelligence models, singling out China at a time that country is narrowing the gap with the US in the AI race. In a Thursday memo, Michael Kratsios, the president’s chief science and technology adviser, accused foreign entities “principally based in China” of engaging in deliberate, industrial-scale campaigns to “distill”, or extract capabilities from, leading AI systems made in the US and […]
content:
WASHINGTON, Apr 24:
The Trump administration is vowing to crack down on foreign tech companies’ exploitation of US artificial intelligence models, singling out China at a time that country is narrowing the gap with the US in the AI race.

title: IIT Kharagpur sets up AI led mining research centre with Rs 15 crore backing from Vikram Sodhi
description: Positioned as an interdisciplinary research initiative, the centre aims to build artificial intelligence solutions tailored to India’s geological conditions while addressing long-standing inefficiencies in the mining ecosystem.
content:
The Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur has set up a new centre of excellence focused on applying artificial intelligence to geological and mining systems, as the institute looks to drive data-led transformation in the sector.

title: Anthropic’s Mythos AI Triggers Bank Security Alarm, FM Sitharaman Steps In
description: India has stepped up scrutiny of emerging artificial intelligence risks to the financial sector, with Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman chairing a high-level meeting with senior bankers and regulatory officials to assess potential cybersecurity threats posed by advanced AI models.
